title: Learn AWS IAM in less than 10 minutes
summary: An educational video introducing AWS IAM fundamentals for beginners. It explains identity and access management concepts through analogies, covers users, roles, and policies, demonstrates least privilege principles, and introduces IAM Access Analyzer for permission discovery.
